item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
printf '"'CURRENT_PLAN_CONTEXT\\n'
nl -ba \""'$plan" | sed -n '"'4,10p'
printf 'CURRENT_DOC_CONTEXT\\n'
nl -ba \""'$docs" | sed -n '"'2,7p'
printf 'OWNER_REFERENCE_INVENTORY\\n'
rg -n -uu 'data-platform|platform-migrations' \""'$root"
new_count=$(rg -o -uu '"'platform-migrations' \""'$root" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
set +e
rg -n -uu 'data-platform' \""'$root"
old_rc=$?
set -e
test "$new_count" = 2 && test "$old_rc" = 1
printf '"'new_owner_occurrences=%s\\n' \""'$new_count"
printf '"'old_owner_occurrences=0\\n'
printf 'OWNERSHIP_DIFF_SCOPE=PASS two_replacements_only\\n'"
